meta.title: Leakage of beta-Galactosidase from Phage-infected Escherichia coli: A Re-evaluation

abstractHtml: Infection of Escherichia coli by bacteriophage T4 is not accompanied by leakage of -galactosidase. Liberation of the enzyme, soon after infection, results from lysis from without. The nature of the lytic enzyme systems responsible for lysis from without is discussed.
